puzzle.hint: A morally wrong action of saying what is not true
puzzle.arabicVerse: فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌۭ فَزَادَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَرَضًۭا ۖ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْذِبُونَ
puzzle.verse: 2:10 - In their hearts is disease, so Allāh has increased their disease; and for them is a painful punishment because they [habitually] used to lie.
